name: Mos' Nilly Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash garlic with salt to form a gritty paste.
2. Add mashed avocado and mash again.
3. Pour lemon juice over the avocado mixture, stirring well to prevent browning.
4. Stir in olive oil, then add Louisiana hot sauce and stir.
5. Add Lea & Perrins Worcestershire Sauce and stir.
6. Incorporate wine vinegar and mix thoroughly.
7. Stir in Poupon or Creole Mustard.
8. Crumble feta cheese into the mixture.
9. Fold in diced tomatoes and chopped parsley or cilantro, stirring until combined.
10. Serve over lettuce. This recipe makes about 3 cups.
